headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Keurig Dr Pepper, Raises Price Target to $38
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Andrea Teixeira   maintains Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $33 to $38.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In On 3 Risk Off Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks in turbulent markets. Check latest analyst ratings at Benzinga. Get news alerts on PM, KDP, and STZ.
